heading: [ES] Tell us a bit about you
subheading: [ES] We'll follow up with the right next step. Fields marked * are required.

fields.name: [ES] Full name
fields.consent: [ES] I agree to be contacted about my request and have read the privacy note.

success.heading: [ES] Thanks — we got your request!
success.body: [ES] We'll reach out shortly with your next step. Prefer to talk now? Message us on WhatsApp.

error.heading: [ES] Something went wrong
error.body: [ES] Please try again, or contact us directly.
error.fallback: [ES] If this keeps happening, email us at {email} or message us on WhatsApp.

validation.name: [ES] Please enter your name.
validation.phone: [ES] Please enter a valid phone number.
validation.email: [ES] Please enter a valid email address.
validation.consent: [ES] Please agree to be contacted so we can help.

privacyNote: [ES] We only collect what we need to help you, and we never sell your information.
